items.title: Where We Met
items.desc: Our gazes locked across the pews one Sunday morning — a quiet nod, a shared hymn, and a love story began in the house of the Lord.

items.title: First Date
items.desc: Suya, laughter, and a long walk by the boulevard. We knew something was beginning.

items.title: The Proposal
items.desc: On bended knee in a quiet corner of Yaounde, with a ring and a trembling voice, she said yes to forever.

event.title: The Celebration
event.subtitle: Join us as we say I do

traditional.label: Traditional Wedding
traditional.venue: Ade Metas beside Radio Hot Coco

groom.name: Derick
groom.desc: Steady as the hills that cradle Bamenda, gentle as the morning light. A builder of dreams and a keeper of promises — his hand in mine is the surest thing I know.

bride.name: Joyce
bride.desc: She walks into a room and the world tilts toward her. Grace in every step, warmth in every word — being loved by her is like standing in perpetual sunshine.

seed.name: Pastor Joseph
seed.message: Two becoming one — a holy mystery and a joyful promise. Praying for you always.
